title: limonium binervosum subsp. dodartii
intro: Limonium binervosum subsp. dodartii, commonly known as Dodart's Sea Lavender or Sea Pyrethrum, is a plant species belonging to the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds. The health benefits of Limonium binervosum subsp. dodartii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful in treating various skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
